# PDF → Markdown Validator - Python Requirements
# Minimal dependencies; scripts work with standard library
# These are optional for enhanced functionality

# No required packages for core validation script
# The validate.py, analyze_failures.py, and compare_runs.py scripts
# use only Python standard library (json, argparse, pathlib, etc.)

# Optional packages for enhanced analysis:
# - pandas>=1.3.0  # For advanced data analysis and CSV export
# - matplotlib>=3.4.0  # For visualization of metrics over time
# - seaborn>=0.11.0  # For statistical plots
# - plotly>=5.0.0  # For interactive dashboards

# If you want to install all optional dependencies:
# pip install pandas matplotlib seaborn plotly
